title: Update readme
body:
Add a `Communications` section to the README to make it more
approachable for new users who want to reach the community and
maintainers.

@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM other than the location of the section in the doc.
Happy green test buttons if you want to cancel the hold @mheon.
